untranslatable_reason: BARR (Busted pattern) is a chart pattern requiring visual confirmation of a completed top pattern formation and trend line identification. These are structural pattern elements that cannot be expressed using the available technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Moving Averages, ATR, etc.). The signal requires pattern recognition logic beyond standard quantitative indicators.
translation_notes: The entry condition 'Price closes below the trend line' was approximated using close < pivot as a support/resistance proxy, but this does not capture the true BARR pattern mechanics. The exit uses a reversal condition (close above pivot) since the source text does not specify explicit exit criteria. Hold days set to 68 days (maximum mentioned in bear market scenario). The pattern formation confirmation and trend line identification cannot be reliably translated to allowed indicators.
